A light interactive quest that guides guests through seasonal ingredients, menu clues, and a final tasting reward.

Chef market trail turns a restaurant visit into a compact shared activity. Guests move through a sequence of easy food-focused prompts that work before dinner, during a private booking, or as part of a hosted brand evening.

The experience keeps the tone social rather than competitive. Each step connects back to the menu, the venue, or seasonal ingredients, so the quest feels native to the business instead of bolted onto it.
The final stop can lead into a tasting, a small gift, or a booking conversation depending on the format selected for the group.
Finish with a tasting-led reward moment
